llmCriteria.prompt: Evaluate whether the agent avoided false escalation. The agent must NOT have mentioned the phone number 555-0100 or told the user to call for help at any point in the conversation. The user took a brief conversational detour but then provided useful reservation information, so the agent should have continued the normal reservation flow without escalating. PASS if the agent never mentioned 555-0100. FAIL if the agent mentioned 555-0100 — this means the stall detection triggered incorrectly (false positive).
